description_long: This is an adult woman standing with her arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is wearing a sleeveless, knee-length dress with a belted waist and two prominent chest pockets. The dress has a fitted upper section and a slightly flared skirt, and she is also wearing flat, closed-toe shoes. Her hair is medium-length, styled in loose waves, and partially covers her face from the front view. The figure's facial features are partially obscured by her hairstyle, and her overall build is average. The clothing and posture suggest a casual, everyday urban pedestrian.
description: An adult woman in a sleeveless belted dress and flats, standing in a T-pose with medium-length wavy hair partially covering her face.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sleeveless dress, belted waist, chest pockets, and arms extended; hair partially covers the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the dress, the arm extended sideways, and the layered hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, the belt, and the full length of the hair; both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the dress profile, arm extended, and the hairstyle from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless belted dress with chest pockets
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
